headlines.title: U.S. Military KC-135 Refueling Plane Crashes in Iraq Rescue Efforts Underway
headlines.summary: A U.S. KC-135 Stratotanker crashed in Iraq during anti-Iran operations, not due to hostile or friendly fire, U.S. Central Command stated. Rescue operations continue. This incident raises concerns over U.S. operational safety amid escalating Middle East conflict, affecting military logistics.

framings.angle: Detailed U.S. Central Command statement on crash cause and ongoing rescue in Iraq
Linked crash to Iran war context with mentions of Hormuz mining and Trump Russia sanctions

headlines.title: Pro-Iran Militia Vows to Target French Interests After Soldier Killed in Northern Iraq
headlines.summary: A French soldier died and others wounded in an attack in Iraqi Kurdistan, prompting President Macron's condemnation. Pro-Iran Ashab Alkahf group threatened French targets post-aircraft carrier arrival. Escalation risks broader coalition involvement in regional conflicts.

framings.angle: Covered Macron statement on soldier death alongside pro-Iran threats to French interests
Highlighted Macron calling attack unacceptable in Kurdish region of northern Iraq

headlines.title: Pakistan Air Force Strikes Kabul and Afghan Border Provinces Killing Four Civilians
headlines.summary: Pakistani jets hit Kabul and provinces targeting Pakistani Taliban, Afghan officials reported four deaths including women and children. Islamabad cites rising militant attacks. This cross-border escalation heightens South Asia tensions disrupting regional stability.

framings.angle: Reported Taliban claims of Pakistani air force strikes on Kabul and border areas
Noted women and children killed in alleged Pakistani attacks on Afghan homes
Confirmed four killed in Kabul by Pakistani strikes targeting TTP militants

headlines.title: Iran's New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei Vows to Block Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: Mojtaba Khamenei pledged in first statement to seal Hormuz strait and target U.S. bases amid war. This threatens global oil shipments already disrupted. Prolonged blockade could spike energy prices worldwide impacting economies.

headlines.title: Russia Triples Strikes on Ukraine Energy Systems Winter Pushing Grid Near Collapse
headlines.summary: Russian attacks on power infrastructure tripled this winter despite repairs and Western aid. Ukrainian grid faces breakdown risk affecting millions. Heightened energy vulnerability prolongs war hardships for civilians.

headlines.title: NATO Mounts First Coordinated Response After Suspected Sabotage Severs Baltic Sea Cable
headlines.summary: Alliance responds to deep-sea cable cut in Baltic Sea amid sabotage fears targeting infrastructure. Critical undersea links vital for data and energy. Signals NATO readiness to counter hybrid threats from adversaries.

headlines.title: NASA Sets Artemis II Crewed Lunar Orbit Mission for April 1 Launch Window
headlines.summary: Six-day window opens April 1 from Kennedy Space Center for first humans to moon since 1972. Advances U.S. lunar program goals. Success boosts space exploration momentum and international partnerships.

headlines.title: Taiwan Parliament Authorizes Government to Sign Stalled U.S. Arms Deals
headlines.summary: Legislature approves defense spending for key U.S. weapons amid China tensions. Taiwan's top arms supplier U.S. welcomes move. Bolsters island defenses against potential invasion raising Indo-Pacific security stakes.

headlines.title: Crew Fears of Iranian Mines Further Slow Oil Tanker Traffic in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: Commercial ships avoid vital waterway due to mine drone missile threats halting flows. Builds on prior disruptions. Global oil supply risks shortages and price surges affecting consumers everywhere.

headlines.title: SpaceX Launches Crew-10 to International Space Station Retrieve Astronauts Stuck Nine Months
headlines.summary: Falcon 9 carried NASA JAXA Roscosmos astronauts from Kennedy Friday docking expected Saturday. Enables return of Butch Wilmore Suni Williams. Routine rotation restores ISS operations continuity.
headlines.previousContext: Crew-10 launched successfully 7:03 p.m. Friday from Florida reaching station around 11:30 p.m. Saturday

headlines.title: Displaced Palestinians Stream Back to Northern Gaza After Israel Breaks Hostage Deadlock
headlines.summary: Israel permits crossing bisecting military zone post-hostage deal. Thousands affected by prior displacement return home. Eases humanitarian strains but security risks persist in enclave.
headlines.previousContext: Israel allows mass foot crossings into north after hostage release impasse resolved

headlines.title: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Overrun Troops Enter Goma Displacing Over One Million Residents
headlines.summary: M23 fighters advance into Congo aid hub with gunfire shelling reported. U.N. notes 1M displaced inside city. Threatens humanitarian crisis worsens East Congo instability.
headlines.previousContext: Rebels enter Goma after overrunning troops residents report gunfire shelling 1M now inside city
